text: Side of the rubber, he was on the mound when the Astros clinched the ALCS, but that sweep against the Yankees. Mancini playing behind the runner at first, he goes, and the pitch is lifted to right by Casianos. Long run for Tucker over toward the line and foul territory makes the catch, and the Houston Astros do it again, 2022 World Series champions for the second time in six years. The Astros are baseball's best.
